title: Define MeshCore-to-LICHEN compatibility contract and mapping table
description: Why this exists: MeshCore app compatibility needs a clear local adapter contract that preserves LICHEN RF/mesh behavior. What needs to be done: define supported MeshCore local operations and map them to LICHEN HAL identity, local CoAP/status/config/message/key flows, or explicit unsupported errors. Include command semantics, response/error policy, transport assumptions, and state ownership. Acceptance criteria: mapping table is recorded in Beads notes or design field; RF protocol boundary is explicit; config/status/message flows have deterministic behavior; unsupported features and semantic mismatches are named.
